description: Dialogue lines, voice assets, and trigger zone definitions for MinPlayableMap

voice_assets.text: The herd moves east. Follow them or starve. The choice is yours, but choose fast — the big predator already smells us.
voice_assets.context: Player approaches the herd migration path — elder warns about predator proximity

voice_assets.text: Water here is clean. Drink now. The next water is two days walk and the raptors patrol that path at dusk.
voice_assets.context: Player finds water source — scout provides tactical information about raptor patrol routes

voice_assets.text: We lost three hunters last season to the valley pack. They hunt in groups — never face them alone. Always keep a tree at your back.
voice_assets.context: Player approaches raptor territory — hunter shares hard-won tactical knowledge

voice_assets.text: This stone is good. Sharp edge, heavy weight. Wrap the hide tight around the grip. A good tool keeps you alive longer than a fast pair of legs.
voice_assets.context: Player finds stone cache — craftsman NPC teaches basic tool-making

dialogue_trigger_zones.label: Dialogue_WaterSource_001
dialogue_trigger_zones.notes: Near clean water — survival tip delivery point

dialogue_trigger_zones.label: Dialogue_HerdPath_001
dialogue_trigger_zones.notes: Herd migration corridor — predator proximity warning

dialogue_trigger_zones.label: Dialogue_RaptorValley_001
dialogue_trigger_zones.notes: Raptor patrol zone entrance — tactical briefing

dialogue_trigger_zones.label: Dialogue_CampfireNight_001
dialogue_trigger_zones.notes: Central campfire — reserved for future night-time dialogue lines

characters.name: Elder
characters.personality: Pragmatic survivor. No sentiment. Every word is information.

characters.name: Scout
characters.role: Pathfinder — knows terrain and water sources
characters.personality: Alert, terse, always scanning environment while speaking

characters.name: Hunter
characters.role: Combat specialist — knows predator behavior from experience
characters.personality: Grim. Has seen people die. Shares knowledge without drama.

characters.name: Craftsman
characters.role: Tool and weapon maker — practical knowledge of materials
characters.personality: Focused on quality. Impatient with carelessness. Proud of craft.

act_1.title: Alone
act_1.description: Player arrives in the valley with nothing. Must find water, food, and shelter before nightfall. No tribe yet — pure solo survival.
key_beats: Find water source (Dialogue_WaterSource_001 triggers Scout warning)
Discover stone cache (Dialogue_StoneCache_001 triggers crafting tutorial)

act_2.title: The Valley
act_2.description: Player learns the valley's dangers. Raptor pack controls the eastern corridor. T-Rex patrols the northern ridge. Herd migrations bring both food and predators.
key_beats: Encounter raptor patrol (Dialogue_RaptorValley_001 triggers Hunter warning)
Witness herd migration (Dialogue_HerdPath_001 triggers Elder warning)
First successful hunt — player proves competence

act_3.title: Tribe
act_3.description: Player has survived long enough to attract other survivors. Tribe forms around demonstrated competence — not leadership by birth or status.
key_beats: Defend camp from night predator attack
Establish territory boundary — tribe claims the valley

previous_cycles_voice_assets.text: Danger! The ground shakes. Run. Run now. Do not look back.
Fire keeps the night beasts away. Gather dry wood. Strike the stones together. Make fire before dark comes.
